function.name: Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct
function.description: Invoke the Qwen3-VL-8B vision-language model for fast image understanding and analysis. Suitable for general image description, question answering, and lightweight reasoning tasks.

prompt.description: The task instruction for the model, e.g. 'Describe this image' or 'Count how many people are in the picture'.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct
function.description: Invoke the Qwen3-VL-32B vision-language model for stronger multimodal reasoning and higher precision image analysis.

prompt.description: The task instruction for the model, especially for complex analysis and reasoning over the image.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct
function.description: Invoke the Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct high-capacity vision-language model for advanced multimodal reasoning and difficult visual question answering.

prompt.description: The instruction describing what to analyze or answer from the image.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: SAM3
function.description: Use SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) for image segmentation by text prompt or bounding boxes, with visualization output.

segment_type.description: Segmentation mode: 'text' for text-prompt segmentation, or 'box' for box-guided segmentation.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to segment in the current environment.

text_prompt.description: Text prompt for target object, required when segment_type is 'text'.

threshold.description: Confidence threshold for text mode, optional, default 0.5.

boxes.description: List of boxes in [x1, y1, x2, y2] format, required when segment_type is 'box'.

labels.description: List of boolean labels aligned with boxes, required when segment_type is 'box'.

function.name: MinerU2.5
function.description: Use MinerU for document layout detection and content extraction from images.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to process in the current environment.

function.name: PaddleOCR
function.description: Use PaddleOCR for OCR text extraction from images.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image for OCR in the current environment.

function.name: EasyOCR
function.description: Use EasyOCR for text recognition on images. This ID tool only exposes image_index; language is fixed to English ('en') internally.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image for OCR in the current environment.

function.name: GroundingDINO
function.description: Use GroundingDINO for prompt-based open-vocabulary object detection on images.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to detect objects in the current environment.

function.name: Qwen-Image-Edit
function.description: Use the Qwen image editing model to modify an image according to a text instruction. The edited image is returned and appended to environment images.

prompt.description: Editing instruction, e.g. 'make the sky sunset orange'.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to edit in the current environment.

function.name: OpenCV
function.description: Use OpenCV for basic image processing operations such as crop, resize, rotate, flip, grayscale, blur, threshold, and canny.

operation.description: Operation name: crop, resize, rotate, flip, grayscale, blur, threshold, or canny.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to process in the current environment.

x.description: Crop top-left x, required for crop.

y.description: Crop top-left y, required for crop.

interpolation.description: Resize interpolation: NEAREST, LINEAR, AREA, CUBIC. Optional for resize.

center.description: Rotation center [x, y], optional for rotate.

flip_code.description: Flip code: 1 horizontal, 0 vertical, -1 both. Required for flip.

thresh.description: Threshold value, required for threshold unless OTSU is used.

maxval.description: Max threshold value, optional for threshold.

type.description: Threshold type: BINARY, BINARY_INV, OTSU. Optional for threshold.

threshold1.description: Canny low threshold, required for canny.

threshold2.description: Canny high threshold, required for canny.

function.name: create_skill
function.description: Create a reusable skill when existing tools are insufficient. Put requirement text in arguments.description.

description.description: What the new skill should do and when to use it.

function.name: run_skill
function.description: Run a skill entrypoint script (.py/.sh) and return textual output. Arguments must follow SKILL.md / SKILL_SPEC definition.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to run.

entrypoint.description: Relative script path under the target skill directory.
